relations.note: Charts/tables carve out an exception to the general accent-shape corner treatment.
Charts/tables carve out an exception to the email accent-shape corner treatment and diagonal-consistency rule.
Same core accent-shape device; email rule adds px conversion and cross-section diagonal consistency for the email surface.

quotes: Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).

rules.intent: Preserve the brand's signature asymmetric-corner container as a recognizable core device across print materials.
rules.rule_text: The brand's signature container device is a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii (the other two corners keep a slight radius); it houses callout text and photography and reads modern and optimistic. In print, use the approved radius pairs: 1.25" & 0.0625" for large containers/photos, 0.5" & 0.0625" for banners, and 0.4375" & 0.0625" for small callout boxes.

quotes: Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair.
Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Ensure the accent shape reads as one coherent, non-jarring device throughout an email by fixing both its converted sizes and its corner orientation.
rules.rule_text: At 96dpi, email uses px conversions of the accent shape radii (e.g., large container 120px & 6px). Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair of corners (e.g., top-left + bottom-right) and the 6px radius to the other pair. The chosen diagonal orientation must stay consistent across all sections within a single email, defaulting to large radius on top-left & bottom-right.

quotes: Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (not the asymmetric accent shape).

rules.intent: Keep data-display containers legible and uniformly framed, avoiding the decorative asymmetry that suits photography/callout containers.
rules.rule_text: Charts and tables are excluded from the asymmetric accent shape device: they must use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (12px uniform radius) instead of the selectively enlarged opposite-corner treatment.
